column2:
Operation and Key Parameters     
    1. Recall Planner (1 LLM call)
column3:
Predicts complexity $c,,$ $$ and extracts keywords $K$ to set level-specific budgets and search scope $(c)$.     
    2. Hierarchical Recall (no LLM calls)     Leaf Activation
column4: Score $L_1$ leaves by $s(m,q,K)=s_{}+(1-)s_{}$ with $0.9$ (cosine similarity + BM25), then select top-$k_1{=}20$.     Ancestor Collection
column5: For each activated leaf, collect ancestors whose levels satisfy $(m)(c)$ (deterministic traversal).     Budgeting
column7:
If candidates exceed per-level budgets, prune by similarity scores; if fewer ancestors exist, terminate early.     
    3. Recall Gating (1 LLM call)
column8: Prompt an LLM to retain/drop each candidate memory conditioned on $(q,c)$, producing the final memory set $_{}$.
